commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Drop; menaces, Ezechiel xx. 46. Septuagint, "thou shalt not disturb (Calmet) or threaten the house of Jacob. "(St. Jerome)
Idol; the calf, worshipped in Bethel. (Challoner)
Hebrew, "Isaac "as ver. 9. (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The house of the idol: Viz., of the calf worshipped in Bethel.
